description: Evaluates enterprise risk management service maturity, platform and process coverage, program and teams, cybersecurity risk leadership, enterprise risk scales, quantified risk for flows, subjects, devices, objects, and supply chain, risk register and exceptions, and SOC correlation of risk profile changes.

capabilities.name: Service Exists and in good condition
capabilities.description: The enterprise has a risk management service that exists and is in good condition.
evaluation_focus: Existence of an enterprise risk management service

capabilities.name: Enterprise Risk Management Platform
capabilities.description: The enterprise uses a risk management platform to monitor, visualize, automate, and integrate risk information across scope.
evaluation_focus: Platform used to monitor and visualize risk
Automation of risk calculation and management

capabilities.name: Enterprise Risk Management Process
capabilities.description: A formal risk management process is documented, implemented enterprise-wide, automated where appropriate, and reviewed on a defined cadence.
evaluation_focus: Process automation via platform or team

capabilities.name: Risk Register and Risk Exception Process
capabilities.description: Risk exceptions when mitigation is not possible are handled with documented policy, platform support, and register review.

capabilities.name: Enterprise Risk Management Program
capabilities.description: A formalized and documented enterprise risk management program and strategy exists and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formal documented ERM program and strategy

capabilities.name: Enterprise Risk Management Teams
capabilities.description: An enterprise risk management team manages and governs the ERM process and program.
evaluation_focus: Dedicated ERM team governing process and program

capabilities.name: Cyber Security Risk Manager
capabilities.description: A Cybersecurity Risk Manager leads the risk management initiative.
evaluation_focus: Cybersecurity Risk Manager role leading the initiative

capabilities.name: Enterprise Wide Risk Scale Definition
capabilities.description: The risk management team defines and reviews enterprise-wide risk scales used for risk-based policies.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise risk scale design for policy use
Risk scale review as the enterprise matures

capabilities.name: Overall Context based Risk score calculation for flows
capabilities.description: The enterprise quantifies risk per flow (subject and object combination), consistently across locations, dynamically, and for reuse across platforms.

capabilities.name: Subject Profile Risk calculation, assessment and monitoring
capabilities.description: The enterprise quantifies, assesses, and monitors risk for each subject accessing enterprise assets.

capabilities.name: Device Risk calculation assessment and monitoring
capabilities.description: The enterprise quantifies, assesses, and monitors risk for each device accessing enterprise assets.

capabilities.name: Object Profile Risk calculation assessment and monitoring
capabilities.description: The enterprise quantifies, assesses, and monitors risk for each object involved in access to enterprise assets.

capabilities.name: Supply chain risk calculation assessment and monitoring
capabilities.description: The enterprise quantifies, assesses, and monitors risk for third-party hardware and software in the supply chain.
evaluation_focus: Third-party hardware and software risk quantification
Supply chain risk consistency across locations
Supply chain risk reuse across platforms

capabilities.name: Changes in Risk profile logging and correlation
capabilities.description: Risk profile changes are formally documented, securely transported, and dynamically captured for SOC correlation.
evaluation_focus: Documented process for risk profile changes to the SOC
Secure transport of risk changes to the SOC
Dynamic risk changes captured and transferred to the SOC

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
